attacking_style: Initiates attacks on steep finishes before the gradient peaks, but struggles to sustain power on super-steep (20%+) ramps where explosive punch is required. Timing is proactive but execution limited on extreme gradients.
team_tactics: Shows willingness to cooperate tactically with rival groups when mutually beneficial, as evidenced by cooperative signals and group work. Positioning is strong entering final climbs, suggesting good domestique support.
terrain_preference: Excels in crosswind scenarios and can compartmentalize strength across varied terrain. Vulnerable on sustained super-steep gradients (20%+) and technical descents where weaknesses have been exposed.
vulnerability: Lacks explosive power for super-steep ramps above 20% gradient. Descending appears to be a technical weakness where stronger riders can exploit gaps.
key_patterns: Attacks early on final climbs but fades when gradient exceeds 20%, gapped twice (Vuelta 2021)
Strong positioning entering decisive moments suggests effective team setup and tactical awareness
Demonstrates compartmentalized fitness: weak descending but strong crosswind ability (Tirreno 2023)
Willing to cooperate tactically with rivals when racing situation demands pragmatic alliances
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 Tirreno showed evolution with race-defining crosswind attack after early career struggles on explosive climbs, suggesting tactical maturation
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 10
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 11
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 11
